name: componentry-closing-plasma
title: Closing Plasma
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Renders an interactive WebGL plasma field with caller-controlled palettes, grain, turbulence, and theme mode.

changes: Repointed the utility import; repaired theme-mode behavior and failed-setup cleanup; guarded buffer creation; clamped shader controls, DPR, and render size; paused outside the viewport and hidden tabs; added a static reduced-motion frame.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import; repaired theme-mode behavior and failed-setup cleanup; guarded buffer creation; clamped shader controls, DPR, and render size; paused outside the viewport and hidden tabs; added a static reduced-motion frame.
modifications.reason: Preserve the shader while bounding GPU work and making its documented theme and lifecycle behavior reliable.
